title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPAL DISTRICT OF BURNAY IN MOUNTAIN PROVINCE TO LAGAWE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5123 / 58 OG No. 24, 4484 (June 11, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3380, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPAL DISTRICT OF BURNAY IN MOUNTAIN PROVINCE TO LAGAWE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipal District of Burnay in Mountain Province is changed to Lagawe.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
